title: Feinberg Forecast: 2026 Oscar Predictions
text: Scott Feinberg, The Hollywood Reporter's Executive Editor of Awards Coverage, projects One Battle After Another will win Best Picture at the 98th Academy Awards, followed by Sinners in second place and Hamnet in third. According to Feinberg's analysis, he bases his forecasts on statistical evidence rather than sentiment. He notes that One Battle has accumulated an extensive portfolio of precursor awards, and he emphasizes that no film has ever lost with the extensive portfolio of precursors this film has collected. However, Feinberg acknowledges significant uncertainty exists. He states that all major categories except Best Actress remain too close to call with any great degree of confidence. Recent controversies at the BAFTA Awards and surprises at the Actor Awards have created additional unpredictability in the race. While Sinners appears to have late-breaking momentum, Feinberg explains his methodology prioritizes historical data over current feelings about the race's direction.
